Off Calendar Jun-30-2020 Continued To Aug-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mary Mayo appeared by telephone for Administrator.

The Court noted that there is a status report, but there is no petition for continued administration. Ms. Mayo stated that she expects to file a petition by the first part of August, that there are no assets and that she may be filing a petition to terminate the estate. Status on close of estate is continued to August 18, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the understanding that a petition will be filed by August 11, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Reyes. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jun-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-10-2020 Continued To Apr-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mary Mayo for Joberth Seneres.

Ms. Mayo stated that there are zero assets in the Estate because prior the passing of the Decedent all of the bank accounts were zeroed out, that they won't know the genesis of that until they have the authority to look at the bank records, that the real property was also transferred to the Brother and the Cousin, and that they will need to litigate this. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required at this time. The Court informed Ms. Mayo that if and when assets are recovered, bond will be required. Status on close of estate is set for March 10, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
